Home / Services / Roof Replacement

Roof Replacement

Upgrade your El Paso home with a durable and stylish new roof.

When repairs are no longer sufficient, Red Rhino Roofing provides complete roof replacement services. We offer a wide selection of roofing materials to suit your style and budget, including asphalt shingles, tile roofs, metal roofs, and flat roofing systems. Our experienced team will guide you through the selection process, ensuring you choose the best option for your El Paso home.

We handle every aspect of the roof replacement process, from removing the old roof to installing the new one with precision and care. We use only high-quality materials and follow industry best practices to ensure a long-lasting and weather-resistant roof. We understand the importance of a properly installed roof in protecting your home from the harsh El Paso elements.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Consultation to discuss your roofing needs and preferences.
  2. 02 Step 2: Removal of the old roof and disposal of debris.
  3. 03 Step 3: Installation of underlayment and flashing.
  4. 04 Step 4: Installation of the new roofing material with expert craftsmanship.

Benefits

  • Increases your home's value.
  • Enhances your home's curb appeal.
  • Provides superior protection from the elements.
  • Improves energy efficiency.

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does a roof replacement take?

The duration of a roof replacement depends on the size and complexity of the roof. Most replacements can be completed in 3-5 days.

How much does a new roof cost?

The cost of a new roof varies depending on the materials used and the size of the roof. We provide free, no-obligation estimates to help you understand the costs involved.

What type of roofing material is best for El Paso?

Asphalt shingles are a popular and cost-effective choice for El Paso homes. Tile roofs are also a good option for their durability and resistance to heat. Metal roofs are increasingly popular for their longevity and energy efficiency.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with roof replacement? Contact us today.
